mods.name: Shinra Meter (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Gothos/neowutran/michaelcarno/LukasTD lineage
mods.short_description: Real-time combat tracker and performance overlay for TERA Classic+.
mods.long_description:
Shinra Meter provides a live overlay showing your damage, healing, and buffs while you play. It helps you track your performance and improve your gameplay with detailed encounter logs.

Features:
- Live combat overlay for you and your party
- Detailed breakdowns of damage, healing, and buffs
- Encounter history and performance tracking
- Customizable in-game display

This version is pre-configured to work seamlessly with the Classic+ launcher.
mods.credits: Originally created by Gothos and maintained by the ShinraMeter community. This Classic+ version is updated and maintained by TERA Europe Classic.
mods.tagline: Tera DPS Meter for the Evervyn and EU Classic Private Servers

mods.name: TCC (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Foglio1024/Tera-custom-cooldowns
mods.short_description: Customizable combat UI with cooldown tracking and boss gauges.
mods.long_description:
TCC (Tera Custom Cooldowns) enhances your game interface with helpful combat windows, including skill cooldowns, party status, and boss health bars.

This Classic+ version is optimized for performance and focuses on the most essential features for players. You can easily customize your experience by turning individual windows on or off in the settings.

Key features include the cooldown tracker, group window, and boss gauge.
mods.credits: Originally created by Foglio1024 and the TCC community. This Classic+ version is maintained by TERA Europe Classic with a focus on essential game features.
